sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْفُطُورُ الْعَرَبِيُّ صِحِّيًّا وَخَفِيفًا لِلْغَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski doručak se smatra veoma zdravim i laganim.
sentences.translationEn: Arab breakfast is considered very healthy and light.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ عَادَةً اللَّبْنَةَ وَالزَّيْتُونَ وَالْخُبْزَ الطَّازَجَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi obično jedu labne, masline i svježi hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: People usually eat labneh, olives, and fresh bread.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَشْرَبُونَ الشَّايَ السَّاخِنَ بِالنَّعْنَاعِ فِي كُلِّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Također piju vrući čaj s nanom svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: They also drink hot tea with mint every morning.
